sources.title: London. To. Brighton. 2006.dvdrip.xvid
sources.description: Desperate to evade an angry pimp, a London prostitute and a young girl flee by train to Brighton after an appointment with a powerful client goes violently wrong.

metadata.Plot: It's 3:07am and two girls burst into a run down London toilet. Joanne is crying her eyes out and her clothing is ripped. Kelly's face is bruised and starting to swell. Duncan Allen lies in his bathroom bleeding to death. Duncan's son, Stuart, has found his father and wants answers. Derek, Kelly's pimp, needs to find Kelly or it will be him who pays. Kelly and Joanne need to get through the next 24 hours alive...
metadata.Actors: Lorraine Stanley, Georgia Groome, Johnny Harris
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award6 wins & 6 nominations total
